subject: Bi-weekly reading hour — Boys & Girls Clubs
body:
Hey team,

Boys & Girls Clubs of Austin & Travis County is restarting their volunteer reading hour at the Eastside Club. Twelve readers pair up with K-3 students for 45 minutes every other Wednesday afternoon.

If you've got an hour at 3pm on alternating Wednesdays and like reading aloud, this is a low-overhead way in. Background check required — BGC handles it, takes about two weeks, and once you're cleared you're cleared for the whole school year.

Reply if interested and Marcus will start the screening.

— Marcus
